strategy_description: WLS quadratic IV in m=log(K/S)/sqrt(T); online vega-weighted ridge toward tape prior; passive VEV limits (below ask / above bid) + hydrogel one-tick MM. v0 used aggressive bid/ask crossing incorrectly for backtester fills — no VEV fills; total mostly hydrogel.
Parameter sweep: lower edge_frac (0.18), min_vega (0.03), passive limits at min(bid,floor(fair)-off); buffer IV every 3 steps; extract MM added. Still no VEV fills under worse-match (passive).
Same smile thesis; cross at touch (buy ask / sell bid) when |mid-fair| > edge_frac*spread so worse-match can fill. Grid point: edge_frac=0.22, min_vega=0.04, vega-tier clips.
Grid refinement on v2: first 120 steps use pooled tape WLS only (no online ridge); require VEV spread>=2; edge_frac=0.26; tighter vega clips. Best total in this sweep.
Same WLS smile thesis from v3; add strike-selective execution (core 5000-5400 preferred), vega-normalized edge gate (abs(edge)/vega), and wider clip sizing on core strikes.
Small grid from v4: slightly stricter edge-per-vega/min-vega and reduced non-core clip size to cut wing noise while keeping touch-cross execution on smile mispricing.
Child of v5: smooth prior-to-online WLS blend (steps 120-300) plus EMA of extract mid changes to scale edge gates and reduce clips during large |dS|; ablation showed regression vs v5.
Child of v5: smooth prior-to-online blend only (steps 120-280), no extract-move gate; ablation: still below v5 (49178).
